calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Jdugment Thereon
Off Calendar Jun-04-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioners Moran Stanley Smith Barney LLC and Darren R. Edwards' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the Petition to Confirm the Arbitrators' Award is granted and the arbitration is confirmed in its entirety and Judgment shall be entered consistent with the Award, including an order to expunge from Darren R. Edwards's Central Registration Depository ("CRD") records (CRD # 4545235) all references to the FINRA Arbitration and Occurrence Number 2259664.

Order Signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
